title: Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park
tagline: Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park — wildlife reserve of Jharkhand

overview.short: Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park (also known as Ranchi Zoo) is located off Chakla village, Ormanjhi in Ranchi, Jharkhand, India.
overview.description: Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park (also known as Ranchi Zoo) is located off Chakla village, Ormanjhi in Ranchi, Jharkhand, India. Ranchi Zoo was established in 1994 at the bank of Getalsud Dam and on the main Ranchi-Hazaribag highway. The park has two divisions the zoological section is dedicated in 83 hectare and botanical section is spread over 21 hectare.

topPlaces.name: Irba
topPlaces.description: Irba is a census town in the Ormanjhi CD block in the Ranchi Sadar subdivision of the Ranchi district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Hutup
topPlaces.description: Hutup is a small village in Ormanjhi tehsil, Ranchi district, Jharkhand, India. It is one of 91 villages in Ormanjhi Block along with villages like Koilari and Karma.

topPlaces.name: Shine Group of Institutions
topPlaces.description: Shine Group of Institutions is a college located in Irba, Ranchi, Jharkhand, India. It has a large campus of 30 acres and more than 130 teachers.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park?
faq.a: Stays in Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhagwan Birsa Biological Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Irba, Hutup, Ormanjhi, Ormanjhi block, Shine Group of Institutions.
